subject: WS1.3 tests and product code green
body: WS1.3 update: failing dataset/DataFactory tests were drafted and failed first on missing namedNode from the empty dataset barrel. Product code is now in place under packages/core/graph-core/src/dataset/index.ts with an additive root export in packages/core/graph-core/src/index.ts. Current validation is green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (34 tests / 2 files), type-check, lint, and build all pass. I have not staged anything and have not touched handoff/continuity surfaces beyond the requested F-21 frictions-register note and coordination state. Ready for type-expert and architecture-expert-betty dispatch against the working tree.
